name: claude-state-drift
description: Marketplace for the claude-state-drift plugin — state-tracking + drift-mitigation for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-state-drift
plugins.description: Keeps long Claude Code sessions anchored. Maintains a per-project .claude/state.json (objective / current focus / deliverables), prints a WHERE YOU ARE orientation block at session start, re-injects the goal as you work, and nudges when state goes stale — with /where-am-i, /update-state, and /re-anchor.
